title: Prometheus Scrape Duration Seconds P99 Regression
dataSources: Splunk metrics index from Prometheus remote write or OTel (`metric_name=scrape_duration_seconds`)
app: OpenTelemetry Collector Prometheus receiver → Splunk Observability Cloud or Splunk Platform metrics
spl:
| mstats avg(_value) AS avg_scrape WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="scrape_duration_seconds" span=5m BY job, instance
| where avg_scrape > 8
| sort - avg_scrape
description: Slow scrapes delay evaluations and can skip intervals on large targets.
value: Detects targets approaching scrape_timeout before silent metric gaps appear.
implementation: Ensure `job` and `instance` labels preserved; align `span` with scrape interval.
visualization: Line chart (p99 scrape duration), Table (worst targets).
